name: Cavern Nephilim

abilities.name: By Need Alone
abilities.text: When this model activates, if it has a Hunger token, it may move up to 3".

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

triggers.name: Paralyzed
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Stunned token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Pick the Bones
triggers.text: After killing, this model may declare the Interact action after resolving the current action.

actions.name: Echolocation
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 1" of blocking terrain, this action deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Premonition
triggers.text: Look at the top card of your fate deck. This model may discard it.

actions.name: Ambush
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model is not in concealing terrain, it must discard a card.
actions.effects: This model moves up to its Sp, unaffected by severe terrain.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 2 as indicated by 'Minion (2)' below the artwork
